## 2026-05-21

### Impact

- **More language support.** French is now accepted as a language value, and the SDK automatically defaults to French on French-locale devices when no language is provided.

### Changes

- Added `Config.Deeplink.Step.manualFallback` for routing users directly into the manual setup / fallback experience
- Added French (`fr`) language support 
- Removed the `publicToken` from the Transact initialize URL

### Products

- Deposit
- Switch
- Manage

### Requirements

| Name  | Version |
| ----- | ------- |
| Xcode | >= 26.1 |
| iOS   | >= 15.0 |
